name: Blue-eyes HERO Dragon
desc:
1 Monster added to your hand by an effect + 1 Dragon Monster
Must be Fusion Summoned.
If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can activate 1 of the following effects;
● Draw 2 cards.
● Add 1 “Fusion” Spell from your Deck to your hand.
● Special Summon up to 2 Dragon monsters from your GY in Defense Position.
You can only activate this effect of “Blue-Eyes Hero Dragon” once per turn.
